nasb.text: Now when the plot was investigated and found to be so, they were both hanged on a gallows; and it was written in the Book of the Chronicles in the king’s presence.

esv.text: When the affair was investigated and found to be so, the men were both hanged on the gallows. And it was recorded in the book of the chronicles in the presence of the king.

cnv.text: 那陰謀查究起來，就發現真相；於是把二人懸掛在木架上。這事在王面前曾寫於史記。

ccb.text: 查明确有此事后，便把二人吊死在木架上，并将这事当着王的面写入史书。
